3058490.name: Pumpkin's Revenge
3058490.description:
Embark on an Epic Adventure with the Pumpkin-Head Hero. Step into the shoes of the Pumpkin-Head, a seasoned adventurer with a glowing gaze that pierces through the darkest dungeons. Armed with a trusty pumpkin mace, smash through skeletal warriors, outmaneuver goblins, and face off against a fire-breathing dragon. As you conquer each dungeon, collect valuable loot and become a legendary beacon of hope in a world overrun by monstrous creatures.

Gameplay


Choose Your Path Wisely. Navigate through treacherous dungeons by selecting hex grids to move forward. Every step matters as you clear paths, collect items, and prepare for battles. Encounter monsters and bosses that will test your skills and strategy. Each enemy you face has a unique attack value, challenging you to balance offense and defense.

Dynamic Combat and Strategy

Hexgrid Movement: Plan your moves on a hexagonal grid to outsmart enemies and uncover hidden treasures.

Diverse Enemies: Face various foes that can poison, blind, or overpower you. Beware of powerful bosses that guard the deepest parts of the dungeons.

Unique Items: Combine rare items, each offering distinctive powers to enhance your gameplay.



Progression and Upgrades

Unlock new cards, heroes, and spells to customize your playthroughs. Each run offers the opportunity to discover new strategies and build upon your previous adventures.

Game Modes

Endless Adventure Or Challenging Campaign

Default Mode: Clear 8 randomly generated dungeons, each increasing in difficulty, to test your mettle and strategic thinking.
Endless Mode: Push your limits in an endless dungeon crawl, aiming for the highest score and longest survival.
